title: Hardcoded credentials or secret values in source code
description: Passwords, API keys, tokens, or connection strings embedded directly in .ps1/.psm1 source files instead of using the AssistedSASC vault or environment variables. This creates a security risk if the repository is shared or committed to version control.
detection_method: Regex scan for common credential patterns in source files
preventionRule: All secrets must be stored in AssistedSASC vault or pulled from environment variables. Never embed passwords, tokens, or keys in source.
remedy: Extract the secret value to AssistedSASC vault or $env: variable. Replace the literal with a Get-SASCSecret call or $env:VAR_NAME reference.
